title: Living in Boulder Vlog 12 - 4 - 2018: 6th day in a row riding, 4th at 100 miles

transcript.text: Hello, living in Boulder vlog. This is the day of December 4th, 2014, 18. Oh man, I wanted to do my vlog with my cell phone. If I had remembered before hitting record, I would have done it. Just 20 seconds back. Oh well, I'll try it tomorrow.

Oh yeah, I want to try it with my cell phone from now on. Do all my vlogs for my cell phone. Then my cell phone's just logged into my vlog all the time. I don't have to push any buttons extra. I just go upload. And then when I do my streaming, I just switch to my streaming user on my computer. And I think I want to even use my other computer for streaming. Only the other computer for streaming. So that I can use this computer for anything else.

But as of now, as long as I don't do Dreamweaver, I can watch music videos on my external hard drive and on YouTube and still stream without dropping. So tomorrow I'll try to do that. Um, riding a hundred miles a day is easy and fun and everything, but, um, you have to, uh, you can't overdo the rest of your life. Like, um, I think I want to try to though at the end of this ride, I want to try to eat a lot at the end of the ride because I have insomnia for hours and hours and hours and hours at the end of the ride.

Cause my heart's just still pumping and stuff. And that'd be a great time to eat and then just lay down. I was kind of laying down with, um, boredom last night. And then I realized, um, I should, uh, and then I just started listening to can't, to manual can't. And so that was cool. And then I started doing it today too.

So I think when I'm just living my life, like with insomnia and all the other stuff, I'll do the audio books for now. And then when I'm writing, it's just the music videos, music videos. Um, firsthand. And I saw all those videos on TV multiple times. And it's like, I'm reliving the eighties, reliving my life, you know, it's really cool. And then, so when I get caught up and I do all the music videos, I want to get caught

And then maybe I could have had a hammer the whole time, but I don't think I'm going to break six hours today. I'm not going to continue to get better. Cause I was walking up the stairs.
